font-family.$description: Font family for H1 elements with .prose applied directly or that are a child of a .prose container.

font-size.$description: Font size for H1 elements — ADS heading xxlarge (~35px).

font-weight.$description: Font weight for H1 — ADS headings run SemiBold.

line-height.$description: Line height for H1 elements with .prose applied directly or that are a child of a .prose container.

letter-spacing.$description: Tracking for H1 — ADS large headings tighten slightly.

measure.$description: Maximum width for H1 elements with .prose applied directly or that are a child of a .prose container.

spacing-before.$description: Amount of margin block start for H1 elements with .prose applied directly or that are a child of a .prose container.

spacing-after.$description: Amount of margin block end for H1 elements with .prose applied directly or that are a child of a .prose container.

color.$description: Color of H1 elements with .prose applied directly or that are a child of a .prose container.

font-style.$description: Font style for H1 elements with .prose applied directly or that are a child of a .prose container.

text-transform.$description: Text transform for H1 elements with .prose applied directly or that are a child of a .prose container.
